source.policy: Flow Properties and Unit Groups are read-only support choices for Foundry imports; import rows must reference existing canonical DB rows instead of creating My Data support rows.

flow_properties.name: Number of items | 物品数量
flow_properties.short_description: Number of items | 物品数量

reference_unit_group.short_description: Unit of kg*km | 质量*距离 单位组

flow_properties.name: Recycled content (mass) | 再生含量（质量）
flow_properties.short_description: Recycled content (mass) | 再生含量（质量）

flow_properties.name: Comparative Toxic Unit for ecosystems (CTUe) | 生态系统比较毒性单位（CTUe）
flow_properties.short_description: Comparative Toxic Unit for ecosystems (CTUe) | 生态系统比较毒性单位（CTUe）

flow_properties.name: Carbon content (biogenic) | 碳含量（生物质）
flow_properties.short_description: Carbon content (biogenic) | 碳含量（生物质）

flow_properties.name: Net calorific value | 净热值, 低位热值
flow_properties.short_description: Net calorific value | 净热值, 低位热值

flow_properties.name: Gross calorific value | 总热值, 高位热值
flow_properties.short_description: Gross calorific value | 总热值, 高位热值

reference_unit_group.short_description: Units of mass | Masseeinheiten | 质量

flow_properties.name: Comparative Toxic Unit for human (CTUh) | 人类比较毒性单位（CTUh）
flow_properties.short_description: Comparative Toxic Unit for human (CTUh) | 人类比较毒性单位（CTUh）

flow_properties.name: Methane content (volume) | 甲烷含量（体积）
flow_properties.short_description: Methane content (volume) | 甲烷含量（体积）

unit_groups.name: Unit of kg*km | 质量*距离
unit_groups.short_description: Unit of kg*km | 质量*距离

unit_groups.name: Units of mass*time | 质量*时间
unit_groups.short_description: Units of mass*time | 质量*时间

unit_groups.name: Units of area*time | 面积*时间
unit_groups.short_description: Units of area*time | 面积*时间

unit_groups.name: Units of volume*time | 体积*时间
unit_groups.short_description: Units of volume*time | 体积*时间

unit_groups.name: Units of mass | Masseeinheiten | 质量
unit_groups.short_description: Units of mass | Masseeinheiten | 质量

flow_property_mappings.reason: Mass units must reuse the public canonical Mass flow property.
Countable-item units must reuse the public canonical Number of items flow property.
Length units must reuse the public canonical Length flow property.
Energy units currently reuse the public canonical Net calorific value support row; this is the existing platform canonical available to imports.
flow_property_mappings.legacy_support_note: The public library does not yet expose a generic Energy flow property; do not create an account-local replacement.

flow_property_mappings.reason: Volume units must reuse the public canonical Volume flow property.
Area units must reuse the public canonical Area flow property.
Area*time units must reuse the public canonical Area*time flow property.
Radioactivity units must reuse the public canonical Radioactivity flow property.
Mass*distance units must reuse the public canonical mass*distance flow property.
Volume*time units must reuse the public canonical Volume*time flow property.
Mole units must reuse the public canonical Moles flow property.
Mass*time units must reuse the public canonical Mass*time flow property.
